task: Refactor the pipeline by first creating a standalone script named `tests/verify_window_focus.py` to test the functionality of `analyze_screen`, `list_windows`, and `focus_window` to detect and focus on the window with "AI Joi" in its title, ensuring the script prints "success" upon completion. Then, update `skill_library.json` by adding a new entry for 'project_context_retrieval' with a basic description, ensuring the entry is correctly formatted and saved. Finally, modify `modules/joi_orchestrator.py` to call `update_manuscript(text=...)` at the transition between planning and execution phases to log a transition message. Verify each step independently to ensure each change is successful before combining them into the full task sequence.

subtasks.description: Create tests/verify_window_focus.py to import analyze_screen, list_windows, focus_window, detect a window titled 'AI Joi', focus it, and print 'success'
subtasks.acceptance_criteria: File exists at tests/verify_window_focus.py, contains imports of analyze_screen, list_windows, focus_window, code to find window title containing 'AI Joi', calls focus_window, and prints 'success'.

subtasks.description: Update skill_library.json by adding a new entry 'project_context_retrieval' with a basic description
subtasks.acceptance_criteria: skill_library.json is valid JSON and contains the key 'project_context_retrieval' with its description.

subtasks.description: Modify modules/joi_orchestrator.py to call update_manuscript(text='Transitioning from planning to execution phase') at the start of the EXECUTE phase
subtasks.acceptance_criteria: modules/joi_orchestrator.py contains a call to update_manuscript(text="Transitioning from planning to execution phase") in the _phase_execute function before executing subtasks.

plan_summary: Add a window focus verification test script, extend skill_library.json, and integrate update_manuscript call in orchestrator
risk_assessment: Medium -- test may require actual window environment, JSON formatting must remain valid, and update_manuscript import may fail if not present
